title: The Rush Hour
writer: Fanny Hatton, Frederic Hatton, Leslie Mason

plot: Margie Dolan, a ticket agent in a steamship office, dreams of endless pleasure and adventures abroad, while her sweetheart, Dan Morley, a drugstore owner, is devoted to his business and his eventual marriage to Margie. When the ho...
